result.short_description: PostgreSQL query latency degraded on prod-db-01 — P95 response time 8× above baseline
result.description: Automated query monitoring detected severe performance degradation on prod-db-01. P95 query latency has risen from 12ms to 98ms over the past 30 minutes. Likely cause: missing index or autovacuum bloat. Standard pg_analyze tool required for query plan inspection. Tool is available from the ACME internal tool registry.

result.short_description: Disk space warning on prod-web-01 — filesystem at 78%
result.description: Root filesystem on prod-web-01 has reached 78% utilisation. Not yet critical but trending upward at approximately 2% per day. Investigate large files and consider log rotation.
